items.title: Julie Mehretu, Claire Valdez, Arthur Jafa
items.summary: Meet the New York artist running for Congress, and some advice to art school graduates.

items.title: 10 Contemporary Artists Reckoning With Fatherhood
items.summary: Immigrant dads, absent dads, flawed dads, fellow artist dads, adopted dads — these artworks explore all that a father figure can be.

items.title: 15 Art Shows to See in Upstate New York This Summer
items.summary: James Turrell’s luminous visions, Agnes Martin’s nonconformist heroism, Anicka Yi’s micro-organic experiments, and much more.

items.title: Georgia O’Keeffe the Wanderer
items.summary: A new documentary presents the artist as a perpetual voyager, generously highlighting her lesser-known work and combating myths about her relationship with Alfred Stieglitz.
